title: Telekinesis
description: Move blocks and entities around with your mind!
body:
# Telekinesis This datapack allows you to manipulate blocks and entities while you are holding the _Telekinesis Wand_, which is just a renamed carrot on a stick. While holding the wand, look at any block/entity to use telekinesis on it. This datapack is also multiplayer compatible. ## Usage - **Right Click:** Increase distance - **Right Click + Sneak:** Decrease distance - **Right Click + Jump:** Throw ---
Known Issues & Limitations 1. Not all blocks work properly with telekinesis
Certain blocks, especially non-full blocks may display incorrect block state or even be invisible during telekinesis.
2. Telekinesis works on players as well, but it's kinda janky :P
Do this at your own risk! 3. Performance considerations
If too many players are actively doing telekinesis at once, some server lag may be experienced. Though from testing it seems the performace is generally pretty okay. 4. Block telekinesis position accuracy issues
When throwing blocks, the blocks may land in slightly off or weird positions. When starting telekinesis on a block, the position of the block display entity will be slightly incorrect.
